key_memories: Worked as a railway engineer in Mumbai for 35 years.
Loved taking the family to Marine Drive every Sunday evening.
Used to play old Kishore Kumar songs at breakfast.
Feels proud when talking about Arjun's first cricket trophy.
Enjoys telling stories about Priya's school dance performances.
daily_routine: Wake up around 6:30 AM and have warm tea.
Short morning walk with light stretching.
Evening music time and family call after 7:30 PM.
